The New Orleans Pelicans have tendered a two-way qualifying offer to Hunter Dickinson, a league source told @spotrac.

Dickinson will now be a restricted free agent this summer.

items.title: Hollander POTD Chuck Person. Rifleman from Auburn was drafted 4th in 86 by IND. Won ROY & good scorer peaking at 21.6 ppg. Quite a trashtalker had legendary battle w/Bird in 91 playoffs. Traded to MIN in 92, became more of bench shooter. Also played w/SA, CHA & SEA thru 00.

items.title: It's come to my attention that kids these days are arguing that Michael Jordan did not have a great basketball IQ, and are using LeBron as an example.
items.author: Morten Stig Jensen
items.body_excerpt:
It's come to my attention that kids these days are arguing that Michael Jordan did not have a great basketball IQ, and are using LeBron as an example.

I have no interest the MJ/LBJ debate, but I'm sorry.

Michael Jordan not having great basketball IQ?

Michael. Jordan.

What are we doing here?
